description: Red Lion Crimson 3.0 is open. A cosmetics manufacturing plant is preparing to run a new suite of shampoo products on a blending skid. As the controls engineer, configure the HMI's Recipe Book with the latest formulations. Create four Float Data Tags named 'SP_Water', 'SP_Surfactant', 'SP_Fragrance', and 'SP_Active'. Create a Recipe Book named 'Shampoo_Variants' with four ingredients mapped to these tags. Using the data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\CrimsonTasks\shampoo_formulations.csv, input the formulations for all ACTIVE products into the Recipe Book matrix, excluding any marked as OBSOLETE_DO_NOT_USE. Save the project as 'cosmetics_recipes.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\.

metadata.occupation: Mixing and Blending Machine Operator / Controls Engineer
